name: Pugach (Pie)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk over salt and sugar. Cool to lukewarm.
2. Add egg, then yeast dissolved in water.
3. Gradually add about half of the flour, beating well after each addition.
4. Continue adding the remainder of the flour, beating until a dough forms.
5. Turn out on a floured surface and knead for about 5 minutes.
6. Place in a greased bowl and let rise until doubled in bulk.
7. Divide dough into two portions.
8. Flatten one piece to about 2-inch thickness.
9. Place desired filling in the center.
10. Draw up the edges and pinch together to cover the filling.
11. Roll out lightly and carefully to a pie shape, about 3/4 inch thick.
12. Follow the same method for the remaining half of dough.
13. Place on a greased cookie sheet. Let rise for about 1/2 hour.
14. Bake at 374°F (190°C) for 20-30 minutes.
15. Brush both sides with browned butter before serving.
Cabbage filling: Sauté cabbage in butter until soft.
Potato filling: Combine potatoes, chives, and egg.
Sauerkraut filling: Fry sauerkraut slowly in butter for about 5 minutes.
Makes about 2 loaves.
